name: Heart Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 stick (4 tbsp) softened butter or margarine
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Easy Yellow Cake as directed and pour batter into greased and floured baking pans: one 8-inch square pan and one 8-inch round pan, or two 9-inch square pans.
2. Bake according to the cake recipe instructions.
3. Allow layers to cool completely.
4. Cut the round layer in half.
5. Place the square layer on a large tray.
6. Place each half of the round layer on an adjoining side of the tray to form a heart shape, trimming ends if necessary.
7. Frost with Strawberry Frosting.
Strawberry Frosting:
1. Cream butter and sugar together in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Drain strawberries and reserve juice.
3. Blend strawberries into the creamed mixture, adding reserved juice as needed to achieve desired spreading consistency.
